Module kivakit.web.jersey
Package com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey

Class BaseRestApplication

java.lang.Object
javax.ws.rs.core.Application
org.glassfish.jersey.server.ResourceConfig
com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey.BaseRestApplication
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Broadcaster, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Repeater, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.repeaters.RepeaterMixin, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Transceiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Receiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Transmitter, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.naming.NamedObject, com.telenav.kivakit.mixins.Mixin, javax.ws.rs.core.Configurable<org.glassfish.jersey.server.ResourceConfig>, javax.ws.rs.core.Configuration, org.glassfish.jersey.ExtendedConfig, org.glassfish.jersey.server.ServerConfig
public abstract class BaseRestApplication extends org.glassfish.jersey.server.ResourceConfig implements com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.repeaters.RepeaterMixin
Base class for Rest applications that clarifies the Jersey API.
Author:
jonathanl (shibo)
